---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with the thesis template
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Set document class option to `...`
2. Compile with `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened (error message, wrong output, etc.).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- TeX distribution: [e.g., TeX Live 2024, MiKTeX]
- Compiler: [e.g., XeLaTeX, LuaLaTeX]
- Template version: [e.g., v1.1.0]

## Minimal Working Example (MWE)
```latex
\documentclass[master]{uos-thesis}
% ... minimal code to reproduce
\begin{document}
\end{document}
```

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
